idempotencyRules: Exact retries create no duplicate jobs, candidates, or receipts.
Reusing an idempotency key with different canonical content is rejected.
Candidate ingestion is unique by arm ID, request ID, result page, and client candidate ID.
A result page and its candidate mappings persist atomically.
authorityRules: AI Analysis Arms analyze only explicitly authorized bounded chunks.
Responses are non-authoritative Discovery suggestions pending human review.
Arms cannot create privacy authorization, human review decisions, Confirmed Idea Units, routing confirmations, Intake approval, Core records, or Change History.
Version 0.1 does not request project names or project routing.
Validated coverage, not job status, determines which chunks were analyzed.
Provider replacement does not change the durable Idea Candidate format.
privacyRules: Provider configuration alone does not authorize transmission.
Every transmitted chunk is covered by an explicit human privacy authorization record.
Managed paths, local paths, storage roots, credentials, secrets, and unrelated Core data are never transmitted.
Transmission receipts record provider, purpose, exact chunk hashes, redaction, and time without storing credentials.
Project State never claims provider deletion or retention behavior it cannot verify.
largeDocumentRules: Stable chunks are transmitted in bounded batches.
Missing or failed batches produce partial coverage.
Result pages use continuation beyond 100 candidates.
Cross-batch consolidation may suggest relationships but cannot merge or delete candidates.
No candidate or chunk may be silently omitted because of a transport or display limit.
